name: Content Calendar Template
description: Content Calendar Template - Marketing template for content professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Set Your Month Go to the Content Calendar tab. The template is set up for a rolling monthly view. Start by entering the month and year at the top. Step 2: Define Your Channels The channel column uses a dropdown: Blog, Social Media, Email, Video, Podcast, PR, Paid Ads, Website, or Other. Pick the channels relevant to your strategy. Step 3: Plan Your Content For each piece of content, fill in: the topic/title, the channel, content type (e.g. blog post, reel, newsletter), the owner (who is responsible), and the target publish date.
